title: Horrorland - With Horror Quests!
description: A modpack only for the bravest! The most terrifying and beloved by the community mods, evil creatures, dark environments, and much more awaits you in Horrorland...
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/HORRORLAND/BH_HORRORLAND_Header.webp) Horrorland is not a modpack for all types of players, it is a modpack for those who want an unprecedented adventure, for those who want to live an epic gaming experience, fight against awesome creatures and mobs that will scare you when you least expect it, and of course, can end your life, in seconds. In addition, it is ideal to play it at special times, such as Halloween, but no doubt, you can continue playing it at any other time of the year, because of course, not only adds horror mods, we have also added RPG mods, animals, immersive, and much more that will make you enjoy your game. **QUESTS NOW AVAILABLE!** ### **Ready to play with your friends on the best hosting?**

I recommend **[Bisect Hosting](https://bisecthosting.com/flashh)** for playing with friends because of their high-quality, lag-free servers. You can install any CurseForge modpack or your custom mods without errors. Plus, their support is available 24/7 to help with any issues. Use my code **[to get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/flashh)** on your purchase. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/HORRORLAND/BH_HORRORLAND_Description.webp) Surviving in this modpack will be a complicated task, but by no means impossible, besides, what will be very difficult will be to get through a single night without being scared... Frights are guaranteed! We have added a lot of mods and creatures, whose only purpose will be to scare you while you play. - As for mythical horror mods, Cave Dweller Reimagined and The End of Herobrine, of course, have been added! - But that's not all, they could not miss The Hordes, The Knocker, The Midnight Lurker or The Undead Revamped, among others, - And other thematic mods that could not be missing in this modpack, are Corail Tombstone, The Graveyard and Eyes in the Darkness, which might give you a scare hahaha! - We have added many enemy mods, but we want to highlight some of the most loved by the community, such as Bosses of Mass Destruction, Ice and Fire: Dragons, L_Ender's Cataclysm or Mutant Monsters. - Biome mods could not be missing either, and for this we have incorporated Biomes O' Plenty and Regions Unexplored! - Living creatures are very important, and Alex's Mobs could not be missing in this modpack either. - Remember that this modpack is ideal for multiplayer play! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/HORRORLAND/BH_HORRORLAND_Screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mJcQB7OR/images/a77c2b1f47ff1244193933989ba819c0e4fbc671.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mJcQB7OR/images/255141f05e5e7d17209d6a7ebbabe827d269b104.jpeg) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mJcQB7OR/images/c5647bf9d1f95ec1250bb437177bdf247c9cbd1b.jpeg)
